title: Champ (disambiguation)
content:
'''Champ''' may refer to the follow:

*'''[[The Champ]]''', a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] champion.
*'''''[[Champion (Bothan Assault Cruiser)|Champion]]''''', a [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]] sometimes referred to as ''Champ''.
